def longest_path(graph, start, end):
    """Returns the longest path from 'start' to 'end' in the graph."""
    path = []
    current_node = start
    while current_node != end:
        path.append(current_node)
        neighbor = graph[current_node]
        next_node = max(neighbor, key=lambda x: graph[x])
        path.append(next_node)
        current_node = next_node
    return path
